## Description
Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Type Of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] CI / repository configuration

## Related Issue
Fixes #(issue number)

## Changes Made
- List the main changes made in this PR
- Be specific about what was modified

## Scientific / Numerical Impact
- [ ] This change has no scientific or numerical behavior impact
- [ ] Energy estimates, resource estimates, or sampling behavior changed
- [ ] Numerical tolerances or validation baselines changed

## Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have added integration or scientific validation tests where applicable
- [ ] I have run `uv run pytest tests/ -v` locally
- [ ] I have run `uv run ruff check src/ tests/` locally
- [ ] I have run `uv run black --check src/ tests/ --line-length 100` locally

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines (black, ruff)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding documentation changes where applicable
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] Tests are passing
- [ ] Coverage does not decrease

## Performance Impact
- [ ] This change has no performance impact
- [ ] This change improves performance (describe briefly)
- [ ] This change may degrade performance (describe mitigation)

## Additional Notes
Add any additional notes or context about the PR here.
